channel.title: wax helsinki
channel.description: DJ mixes and sets from wax helsinki.
channel.itunes:author: wax helsinki
channel.itunes:summary: DJ mixes and sets from wax helsinki.

item.title: WAXMIX 018
item.description: Chill-out summer blend by Elmo: laidback soul, mellow hiphop, and easy sunset grooves.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Chill-out summer blend by Elmo: laidback soul, mellow hiphop, and easy sunset grooves.

item.title: WAXMIX 017
item.description: Elmo house vibes: warm grooves, rolling basslines, and late-night floor energy.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Elmo house vibes: warm grooves, rolling basslines, and late-night floor energy.

item.title: WAXMIX 016
item.description: Elmo with a stripped-back minimal house flow and late-night groove tension.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Elmo with a stripped-back minimal house flow and late-night groove tension.

item.title: WAXMIX 015
item.description: Elmo live at Bar Loop: a warm, deep house ride with late-night swing.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Elmo live at Bar Loop: a warm, deep house ride with late-night swing.

item.title: WAXMIX 014
item.description: Elmo & Konstantin live at Bar Loop.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Elmo & Konstantin live at Bar Loop.

item.title: WAXMIX 012
item.description: Elmo & Konstantin at Loop: a chilled, late-night techno house drift.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Elmo & Konstantin at Loop: a chilled, late-night techno house drift.

item.title: WAXMIX 011
item.description: At Beatroot by Elmo & Konstantin: deep warehouse techno house session.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: At Beatroot by Elmo & Konstantin: deep warehouse techno house session.

item.title: WAXMIX 010
item.description: Elmo & Konstantin live at Beatroot: rolling techno house with raw club energy.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Elmo & Konstantin live at Beatroot: rolling techno house with raw club energy.

item.title: WAXMIX 009
item.description: Studio Mix p3 by Elmo & Konstantin: punchy house rollers and deep techno flow.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Studio Mix p3 by Elmo & Konstantin: punchy house rollers and deep techno flow.

item.title: WAXMIX 008
item.description: Studio Mix p2 by Elmo & Konstantin: long-form techno house pressure and dubby textures.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Studio Mix p2 by Elmo & Konstantin: long-form techno house pressure and dubby textures.

item.title: WAXMIX 007
item.description: Studio Mix p1 by Elmo & Konstantin: deep techno and house pressure.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Studio Mix p1 by Elmo & Konstantin: deep techno and house pressure.

item.title: WAXMIX 006
item.description: Driving late-night techno house with rolling drums and hypnotic bass by Elmo.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Driving late-night techno house with rolling drums and hypnotic bass by Elmo.

item.title: WAXMIX 005
item.description: Warm, groove-led house cuts with crisp techno edges and swing by Elmo.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Warm, groove-led house cuts with crisp techno edges and swing by Elmo.

item.title: WAXMIX 004
item.description: Long-form warehouse trip through deep techno and minimal house by Elmo & Konstantin.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Long-form warehouse trip through deep techno and minimal house by Elmo & Konstantin.

item.title: WAXMIX 003
item.description: Dark, percussive techno house journey with dubbed textures by Elmo & Konstantin.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Dark, percussive techno house journey with dubbed textures by Elmo & Konstantin.

item.title: WAXMIX 002
item.description: Hypnotic techno house blend with soulful chords and heads-down energy by Elmo & Konstantin.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Hypnotic techno house blend with soulful chords and heads-down energy by Elmo & Konstantin.

item.title: WAXMIX 001
item.description: Foundational Wax Helsinki set: classic house rhythms and raw techno pulse by Elmo.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Foundational Wax Helsinki set: classic house rhythms and raw techno pulse by Elmo.
